programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Purssy keeps sneaking into Betty's room and messing it up while she's away on galactic missions. Betty finally scares him off – with help from an alien dragon – in time to accompany Noah to a dance.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Hopper the Chopper returns in an attempt to rob a train containing material to make indestructible metal. Can Betty prevent it from happening?

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus and Nuclea team compete to locate an immortality potion. Can Betty beat them to it before either of them become immortal? Meanwhile, Betty's Mom helps Purrsy stay fit.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: On Earth, Betty gets salesmanship advice from her father as she tries to sell candy door-to-door. Meanwhile, in space, Sparky becomes a movie star when famous galactic director Antoine Lucci casts him in his latest movie.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty's old martial arts trainer, Spindly Tam Kanushu, is captured by Maximus, who wants him to train his Morbidian Blood Monks in the martial arts./Betty and her classmates participate in a science fair at school.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: While Betty and X-5 are waiting for Sparky to finish using the bathroom after ingesting too many montegoberries, Sparky finds a set of bongo drums at a yard sale,.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: It's April Fools' Day on Earth, and Sparky gets a little carried away with his pranks because he wants to be like the host of his favorite 3V show "Prank'd". But then, the host comes to Earth to stop Sparky because he thinks he's trying to steal his show.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: It is Betty's thirteenth birthday, and Betty's family and friends are arranging a surprise birthday party. Meanwhile, after years of work, X-5 has managed to complete a working time machine.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty, Sparky, and X-5, as the band Jackamoose, finish a music video, to be shared only amongst themselves. However, Sparky decides to publish their music video (with an album cover reminiscent of Abbey Road), which becomes a massive hit.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Its Valentine's Day on Earth, but Betty has no admirers. In space however, she has a criminal secret admirer who is committing crimes in the name of love for her.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: When Nuclea moves into Maximus' territory in space, he wages war against her. Meanwhile, Betty has a new friend, named Paloma, who just moved into the neighborhood.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty is called upon to protect an amulet of the ancient bird-people of Shangri-La-De-Da, said to give the wearer unimaginable power. Meanwhile, Purrsy gets stuck up a tree on Earth, enough to cause mass disturbia.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: The Collector is bent on stealing a legendary gem. On Earth, Betty's bratty cousin, Kyle pesters Betty's friends about a comic book.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus is sick. Minimus takes over his master's evil duties and orders scavenger probes to capture "That girl, Betty". Soon the citadel is overrun with hundreds of Betty's from all over the galaxy.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: On Earth, a mix-up at a barbecue has Dylan thinking Betty is a vegetarian. In space, Minimus accidentally spills a growth serum on his ant farm, mistakenly creating an army of giant ants which Betty must battle.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty goes to a party at the museum where Penelope's dad has named an Egyptian wing after his daughter. But during the party, Penelope stumbles onto a magic necklace that brings all of the mummies in the museum to life.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: It's the time of year that Betty and her family take a family trip to a pirate-themed amusement park, leaving X-5 to take care of the house, but not before X-5 hands Betty his new invention.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: During swim class, Betty has to put away her Galactic Guardian bracelet in her locker. But, then, Penelope finds Betty's bracelet and claims it to be hers!

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty has a date after school with Dylan, the new boy in her class, but first she must stop Maximus, who has created a new explosive device known as the Shredder, which upon detonation, with destroy the time.

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty and Noah get separated while visiting a house of mirrors at an amusement park, and Betty is called off on a mission to protect a pair of scientists and their cargo from an evil shape-shifting spy known as The Chameleon.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty battles evil space buccaneers (led by notorious pirate Greenbeard) in a search for intergalactic treasure, while on Earth, Noah accompanies Betty and her family on a visit to Betty's Uncle Charlie's farm.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty must defend the people of Earth from becoming tacky Earthonian furnishings, and her bedroom from becoming a "Fuzzy Fushia Forest".

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram ... and a salivating T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan help a young mother who claims her newborn baby was stolen from her after she gave birth in a taxi on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a famous baseball player's father, who gambled his son's earnings on sporting events.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A young actress claiming to have been the victim of a white slavery ring becomes the prime suspect when a wealthy Japanese businessman is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A safe-deposit-box company eventually exposes a political activist who went underground 20 years earlier to avoid a murder charge.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.desc: The new coach of the town's football team endangers the boys' spirits and health in his attempt to regain past glories.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The School for the Blind's caretaker sets out to become a respectable farmer so that he may adopt two orphaned brothers.

programme.desc: Albert claims that he is tall and athletic in a letter to his pen pal; she has fabrications of her own to conceal her paralysis.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: La manada más salvaje
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Diana se perfilan como las más odiadas del grupo, mientras que el nuevo ex le quita el lugar a Christian. Yurgenis avanza con Brandon y una fiesta salvaje rompe con todo lo que ellos creían de sí mismos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A chemist has developed a miracle hair restorer. He cons a man into swiping the multi-million dollar formula so that he can then sell it out from underneath his employers. Murder ensues and the man finds himself in a "hairy" situation.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s client is accused of killing his ambulance-chasing lawyer who specializes in cases of personal injury – especially when the injuries occur at a local amusement park.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: After the death of the second of three boys who witnessed a murder 15 years ago, the trial of Ben's client requires the exposure of the secrets of some of his hometown's most prominent residents.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s personal accountant seeks representation by Ben when he is framed for the brutal murder of his employer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A vacation to a wild west ghost town becomes more than Matlock bargained for as a bump on the head takes him straight back in time to the real old wild west, surrounded by familiar faces – with very unfamiliar occupations.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s dull, droning insurance broker, Allan Corning finds therapy for his struggling marriage interrupted by the sudden murder of his therapist, Dr. Harding Fletcher.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock becomes embroiled in Attorney/Client privilege issues when he defends two murder suspects whose cases become strangely intertwined.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: Heather's pregnancy test puts things into perspective for Josh Altman; James and David may walk away from the St. Ives listing; Josh Flagg shifts his focus to a personal issue; David heads off to Italy to pop the question to Adrian.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million-dollar listing in the Bird Streets enclave, leading to the agents facing off at the negotiating table; James and David's big listing begins to slip away.

programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2 million-dollar closet, but his client refuses every offer; Josh Flagg takes an Internet mogul shopping for a fixer-upper to flip; David copes with a devastating family issue.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Madison's easy beachfront sale becomes jeopardized when his client works with another agent; Josh Flagg's historical party pad attracts eyes, but no offers; Josh Altman has a hard time keeping two Santa Monica listings straight.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman finds himself caught between his fiancée and his client; Josh Flagg struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listing; James and David cannot see eye-to-eye on a price for their sexy, contemporary listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern and must fight off developers who want to bulldoze it; Josh and Heather return home from their wedding to find their dream house; James and David are asked to help a developer who previously rejected them.

programme.desc: Josh Altman battles his own client over a $20 million listing price; Josh makes a big decision; Madison helps a client downsize.

programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a compound; Josh Flagg lists a historical home; Josh Altman risks his relationship with one of his best clients and friends.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Sal Mineo guest stars as a ruthless young operator who heads up an international narcotics ring which the IMF attempts to break up on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Christopher Connelly guest stars as a non-cooperative young computer genius who has "dropped out" of society, but is desperately needed by the IMF to complete their assignment on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: John Colicos guest stars as a rebellious Caribbean government official, who plans to take over his country by having his president assassinated while in the United States to speak before a joint session of Congress

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pretzel factory to see how people make pretzels. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday and Queen Sara have an argument, which worries Prince Tuesday. He runs away to the home of his friend Daniel Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes on an airplane and visits with the pilot and flight attendant, who show him around the plane to help children feel more familiar when traveling by air.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches former Pittsburgh Steeler wide receiver Lynn Swann practice ballet with a dance company. He tells Mister Rogers how dancing has helped him play football. Lynn Swann also visits the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday announces the winner of the “Draw The Neighborhood” contest and awards a very unusual prize to everyone -- a rainbow. Mister Rogers shows a video of how real gold is processed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to visit ice skating star Peggy Fleming, who is practicing for an ice show. They talk about how doing anything well takes a lot of practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits his friend Adelia Moore to see how she makes stuffed animals for her children. In the Neighborhood of Make- Believe, the Neighbors are making presents for Ana Platypus' birthday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how spoons are made. King Friday demands that Lady Aberlin and Robert Troll create a mountain beside the castle. Mary Alice Sherred makes music with spoons.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a juniper tree. Everyone is covering the Eiffel Tower with trees. Queen Sara falls off the tower and is taken to an emergency room. Mister Rogers shows an emergency room.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small kitten that belongs to Chuck Aber. Mister Rogers shows a film about seat belts. King Friday wants to see a mountain opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a popcorn popper. He is introduced to Ray Detwiler who plays rare horns. Chef Brockett gives a popcorn ball to King Friday who declares there be popcorn in the opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make towels. The Neighborhood of Make-Believe is hosting the Make-Believe Olympic Games. Lady Elaine will only agree to play if she is guaranteed to win the games.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with two pieces of wood and turns a chair into a rocking chair. Lady Aberlin and Bob Dog help Corney make rocking chairs. They are unable to stop rocking thanks to Lady Elaine's boomerang.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a robot factory. A robot talks with Lady Elaine but does not understand the term like. Daniel talks to the robot about caring. Handyman Negri tells Daniel that it's great to love others.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota lleva a Tommy y Angélica al trabajo. Ellos hacen un desastre y casi arruinan un contrato. Un ángel de la guarda, le muestra a Carlitos como hubiera sido la vida de su familia si él nunca hubiera nacido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene un sueño muy real, y los bebes intentan convencerlo de que no está soñando. Cansada de ser dejada de lado en la casa de Phil y Lil, Angelica dice que ella sabe quien de los mellizos es el favorito y cuál el olvidado.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos está cansado de que la gente bromee con su pelo colorado, y le pide a Tommy que se lo tiña negro con la tintura del Abuelo. Cuando Firulais se pierde, Hugo trata de reemplazarlo con una serie nueva de juguetes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que Carlitos es un extraterrestre. Después de que Chas le habla a Carlitos sobre los gérmenes, Carlitos tiene temor de tocar cosas por miedo a tener contacto con gérmenes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota anuncia que está embarazada, y Angélica teme ser olvidada una vez que nazca el bebé. Los Rugrats se imaginan que son héroes para recuperar los muñecos de su programa de televisión favorito que Angélica les quitó.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cansados del maltrato de Angélica, los Rugrats van a jugar con otro niño en el parque llamado Josh, quien termina siendo peor que Angélica. Angélica decide denunciar a sus padres cuando ellos tratan de hacerle comer brócoli.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats van a la casa de Boris y Minka para pasar las Pascuas y, por accidente, se quedan todos encerrados en el ático. Para pasar el tiempo, Boris les cuenta a los bebés la historia de Moisés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Hugo rompe el televisor, los Rugrats usan una caja vacía para crear sus propios programas. Angélica les dice a los bebés que el cielo se está cayendo y que está llegando el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta una mascota, el insecto Melville. Cuando Melville muere, a Carlitos le cuesta mucho aceptarlo y pasa por todos los procesos del duelo. Angélica les pide a los Rugrats que la mantengan alejada de las galletas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de una nueva niña, Megan, y demuestran su cariño molestándose. Los Rugrats están felices de que Angélica se va a mudar lejos, hasta que Tommy comienza a recordar el primer día que todos se conocieron.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El comportamiento de Firulais se vuelve un poco extraño cuando adopta unos gatitos y los esconde en su casa. / Carlitos se contagia de varicela, y Angélica les dice a los bebés que es una enfermedad que te convierte en pollo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras escuchan un programa de radio con el Abuelo, los Rugrats juegan a ser detectives y se preponen resolver un misterio. / Angélica convence a los Rugrats de que puede predecir el futuro, y les pide juguetes y galletas como pago.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Julio compiten entre sí grabando los momentos más divertidos de sus hijos para ganar un concurso de un programa de televisión. / Los Rugrats compiten en contra de los bebés McNulty para salvar la medalla de oro de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats batallan contra Angélica en un lavadero de carros. / Tommy y su guía mística Sabu, cruzan el patio de los Pickles en medio de una ola de calor, para llegar a la “tierra de las aguas” y combatir su sed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shakky explains why Sabaody Archipelago seems to be crawling with bounty hunters – eleven of the Grand Line's most wanted pirates are currently ashore and two of them are in Luffy's crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger keeps Zoro from tangling with a powerful Celestial Dragon, and Chopper goes bonkers when Camie disappears from the amusement park.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Camie was abducted by a dastardly gang of kidnappers, and her next stop is the auction house unless the Straw Hats can rescue her. To make it in time, they'll have to hitch a ride on some flying fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their fishy mates, the Straw Hats make it to the auction house in time to save Camie, but explosive elements prevent them from taking her back by force. Luckily, Nami's concocted a very generous plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's plan to save Camie goes belly up when a snot-nosed Celestial Dragon outbids the Straw Hats. Luffy and Zoro make an explosive arrival at the auction house and promptly open up a deadly can of worms.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turns a mermaid auction into a pirate-style brawl when he knocks the snot out of a Celestial Dragon. With a fleet of marines out to get them, the Straw Hats will have to fight their way off the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: They saved Camie from the auction block, but now the Straw Hats are surrounded by a fleet of marines. Lucky for Luffy, Eustass "Captain" Kidd and Trafalgar Law are ready to join the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats join forces with Kidd's crew and Trafalgar's mates to make short work of the marines, but they're in for a surprise when they encounter a Warlord of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew duck the marines by hiding out at Rayleigh's house. While Chopper tends to Hachi, Rayleigh entertains the Straw Hats with tales of his days as first mate on Gold Roger's ship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Admiral Kizaru has arrived to lead the marines on a mission to wipe out all pirates. Meanwhile, Luffy and his crew prepare for a deadly battle with one of the Warlords of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A groovy pirate belts out a tune that leaves Kizaru in pieces, but the admiral pulls himself together in time for a crushing Light Speed Kick. Luffy and Sanji try to protect the injured Zoro from a Warlord lookalike.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats narrowly defeat a robot that resembles one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea. But before the dust settles on the field of battle, a far deadlier foe comes looking for a fight.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's barely breathing, and Admiral Kizaru is ready to stomp him into oblivion. The battered and beaten Straw Hats could certainly use a powerful friend right about now.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the mighty paw-print of Bartholomew Kuma makes the Straw Hats disappear until only Luffy remains. To where did his mates vanish? And will he ever see them again?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yesterday, the Straw Hats valiantly battled a Warlord of the Sea. Today, Boss Luffy and his friends at the Pinwheel Diner prepare to compete in the Great Portable Shrine Race!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thriller Company sabotages the race for a sacred treasure, and the displaced Straw Hats must pull an all-nighter to rebuild their shrine and score some ancient gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finds himself stranded and starving on a strange island. The rubber-man's amazing appetite puts his manhood in danger when he devours an array of exotic mushrooms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An army of scantily-clad women warriors want to investigate Luffy's family jewels, but the captain of the Straw Hats is more interested in reuniting with his lost mates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The women chasing Luffy are loyal subjects of Boa Hancock, the curvaceous Warlord of the Sea. This stone-cold beauty is deadly, and she's about to pick a fight with an entire fleet of marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's search for a seaworthy vessel leads to a "drop-in" on the Snake Princess during the royal bathing hour. The view is world-class, but it might turn the rubber-man to stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock makes Luffy mad when she turns Margaret into a statue. The Snake Princess may have bitten off more than she can chew by challenging the captain of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Snake Princess pits Luffy's Gum-Gum abilities against the incredible Haki power of her serpentine sisters in a fight to the death. Will Luffy survive long enough to save his statuesque friends?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks his attack mode into Second Gear to save a precious statue, and the snake sisters start to feel the Straw Hat heat. At the battle's climax, Luffy makes an impression on his opponents.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of Luffy's run-in with the Celestial Dragons impresses the Snake Princess, so she tells him the story of her tortured past. Will his honorable nature speed Luffy toward a reunion with his crew?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is mobbed by a hoard of pretty Kuja women eager to touch a real live man. Granny Nyon offers him a safe haven, but what she has to say might sink his plans for a Straw Hat reunion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock's illness threatens to sabotage Luffy's rescue mission. However, the Snake Princess just can't say "no" to the rubber-man, so a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy races to save Ace, Nami tries to survive life on Sky Island, and Franky dances up a snowstorm before making the switch from cola to tea!

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Police follow a lead in a missing persons investigation to a 115-acre farm, unearthing the site of a gruesome crime and a seductive killer that will go down in New Hampshire history.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A loving father agrees to give his ex-wife a chance to reconcile; when his loved ones can't reach him, an unexpected tip is brought to Oklahoma police that uncovers a toxic love triangle and horrific crime scene.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved family man dies in a house fire, his wife and children must grapple with his unexpected loss.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a professional basketball star is gunned down in his hometown of Memphis, Tenn., the case goes cold for nearly a decade; after a new team of investigators takes over, it uncovers the missing murder weapon and a mastermind close to home court.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 62-year-old man bails his stepdaughter out of jail for attempted murder and is soon found dead, but investigators learn his death may not be what it seems.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Texas Rangers are brought in to investigate the most recent death when a San Angelo, Texas, woman loses three romantic partners in the span of three years.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Years after a beloved father is accidentally shot in his home, the family matriarch mysteriously vanishes; as a second investigation launches, a shocking confession reveals a family secret about how far a son is willing to go for his mother.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 911 call in an upscale neighborhood leads police to the bodies of a mother and daughter in what appears to be a murder-suicide; investigators discover a trail of deceit that exposes an unexpected killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 32-year-old man vanishes in Fort Meyers, Fla., and police quickly link an abandoned, blood soaked vehicle to his case, but investigators must determine if this missing man is a victim or killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Investigators follow a surveillance trail to uncover the events that led to the death of an Arizona man, who is shot in his garage before he is able to read the results of a paternity test.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a loving father is gunned down in upstate New York, a hunt for the gunman crosses state lines; as several suspects are brought in, investigators must determine who's telling the truth to reveal the mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Texas woman discovers her husband's brutally stabbed body in their ransacked home and police suspect he was the victim of a robbery gone wrong, but the investigation reveals a torrid love affair.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After what appears to be a fatal road rage incident, authorities in Clifton, Ariz., follow a trail of recovered text messages that suggest this was no random attack, but instead a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Florida woman's search for her missing husband takes a turn when his body is found in a landfill; as detectives dig into his home life, the victim's family becomes a crucial link to uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A beloved psychologist is found murdered and left in the trunk of a car in the Nevada desert; as the strange case unfolds, police discover he may have been the victim of a model aiming to maintain her lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Peruvian healthcare worker gets a second chance at love until he's found murdered in his apartment; investigators set out to discover whether his new bride is a grieving widow or a femme fatale.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A healthcare worker is viciously attacked in her home with only her daughter as a witness; police must follow the clues at the scene to discover the truth behind the attack.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Between the unpredictable hippos and massive man-eating crocodiles of Gabon, Central Africa, Cyril must remain on high alert especially from his small tippy dugout.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: After meeting with a young fisherman who was violently bitten by a monster barracuda, Cyril searches the Florida Keys to find this toothy torpedo, and to learn more about these ferocious hunters.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril has heard disturbing stories of people being accidentally injured and even killed by the huge jumping Gulf Sturgeon - and its even bigger cousin, the White Sturgeon, is the most massive freshwater fish in North America, growing to over 1500 lbs.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Guyana's jungle in South America is wild and untamed, a remote no-man's land patrolled by jaguars, and where gold diggers still look for a bounty.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Is is possible to catch the fish Cyril is after without them getting devoured by the sharks? Cyril is in the South Pacific to catch a huge, legendary fish known to the locals as the Uruati.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom washes out in Idaho and retreats to the Yaak; Eustace races to stop a breakout and Morgan battles predators large and small.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom scrambles a last-minute bear hunt to save his season; Morgan fights for his future with fire; Eustace has an unexpected showdown.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom pays the price for two consecutive failed winters; Morgan calls in reinforcements for his horses; Eustace and Preston harvest a hog and Rich makes a pick of the litter.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Season after season, the mountain men are locked in an endless battle against winter: the most dangerous predator of them all.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Winter descends on the mountains without mercy; Marty is trapped in 50 below, Morgan and Tom forge new alliances; Rich battles a rogue grizzly.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The crew witnesses the destructive power of a Typhon. A huge thunderstorm forces the men to take shelter in a remote village.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: In Germany, cameraman Casey Bays puts Steven’s patience to the test. Scott continues to show signs of discontent. News media from around the world takes interest in the expedition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Buying partnerships are tested at an auction in Brampton. Bogart puts Paul on a diet. Meanwhile, Rick squirms when Cindy wants him to wear a spiffy new shirt. Ursula tries on her bossy-pants, but what Roy finds really puts the icing on the cake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: After months of waiting for Cindy to set a wedding date, Rick makes a bold move at an auction in Mississauga. Roy records his memoirs for bidding posterity. Ursula finds a new place to stash her booze, and Paul and Bogart get conched on the head.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Bogart's hooked on goji berry juice and plans to spread the word at an auction in Milton. Roy is in all white, looking to spread distraction. Cindy's mind is on the lockers, but Rick's is in the gutter. Ursula has a bonsai to pick with her locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy reaches new levels of distraction by training a talking parrot to insult the rest of the buyers at an auction in Etobicoke. Rick and Cindy do some detective work, Ursula could use a hand, and Paul and Bogart make money where the sun doesn't shine.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Cindy comes to an auction in Toronto with voodoo dolls of the other buyers. Rick's not convinced but knows better than to question Cindy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: It’s round robin mind-games when Ursula outsmarts Roy…who outsmarts Cindy…who outsmarts Paul and Bogart, who not so smartly make a bad decision.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The father/son team of Paul and Bogart splits up to go locker vs locker in Claireville. May the best Kenny win!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: A Brampton auction near some of the gang’s old high school proves they’re all still rowdy teenagers at heart.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy hires bodyguards to keep the riff-raff away at an auction in Brampton. Bogart quits, but just when he thinks he's out can Paul pull him back in? Rick and Cindy make a wicked-awesome discovery, and Ursula gets carried away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Tensions run high between Roy and Ursula at an auction in Thornhill. Roy brings his dog for support and Ursula does her best to ignore them. Paul and Bogart hope their life coach will give them a leg up, and Cindy can't hear a word anyone is saying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul, Bogart, and their life coach go to an auction in Toronto. If any problems arise, they must “hug it out.” Ursula encourages her daughter to run away to join the circus. Rick takes charge, Cindy doesn't notice, and Roy sets his glass on fire.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Jeff Schwarz, aka “The Liquidator,” is back and is causing as much chaos as possible.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: In the midst of a worldwide pandemic, Rick, Marty and the team return to Oak Island. Armed with evidence of possible tunnels leading to the Money Pit, the fellowship is convinced they have the tools to solve the Oak Island mystery.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Out of quarantine and ready for action, Rick, Marty and the team unearth hard evidence of a centuries old tar kiln, suggesting significant industry happened on Oak Island long before the discovery of the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: As Gary and Jack unearth new evidence suggesting substantial industry between Lot 15 and the mysterious swamp, the fellowship makes the aggressive and expensive decision to excavate the mysterious bog entirely, once and for all.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team is amazed when an evolving theory accurately identifies two man-made anomalies that they believe may be landmarks created to pinpoint the Money Pit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When coming to a xenophobic isolationist planet, Captain Kirk and his landing party are punished for trespassing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: At the same time McCoy discovers that he has a year to live, the U.S.S. Enterprise encounters the asteroid Yonada which is determined to be artificially propelled.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: la película
programme.desc: Cuando un alienígena no identificado destruye tres poderosos cruceros klingon, el capitán James T. Kirk (William Shatner) regresa al U.S.S. Enterprise™ para tomar el mando.

programme.title: Star Trek II: la ira de Khan
programme.desc: Es el siglo XXIII. La Federación Unida de Planetas Enterprise está haciendo maniobras de entrenamiento de rutina, y el almirante James T. Kirk parece resignado al hecho de que esta inspección puede ser la última misión espacial de su carrera.

programme.title: Star Trek III: la búsqueda de Spock
programme.desc: La derrota del almirante Kirk sobre Khan y la creación del planeta Génesis son victorias vacías. Spock está muerto y McCoy se ha vuelto inexplicablemente loco. Luego, una visita sorpresa de Sarek, el padre de Spock, provee una revelación sorprendente.

programme.title: Star trek (2009) (ESP)
programme.desc: La mayor aventura de todos los tiempos comienza con Star Trek, la increíble historia de una joven tripulación en su viaje de bautismo sobre la más moderna nave espacial jamás creada: la U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando un despiadado genio conocido como Khan (Benedict Cumberbatch) declara una guerra en solitario contra la Federación, el capitán Kirk, Spock y la intrépida tripulación del U.S.S. Enterprise emprenden la mayor cacería de la historia.

programme.title: Star Trek: sin límites
programme.desc: En una misión de rescate, el USS Enterprise es atacado por Krall, un caudillo militar que ha jurado destruir a la Federación. Estrelló en un mundo desconocido, la tripulación debe unir fuerzas con Jaylah, una guerrera alienígena, para detener Krall.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An accident turns O'Brien's eight-year-old daughter into a wild, dangerously un-socialized eighteen-year-old.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko and the crew race to save a Starfleet captain stranded alone on an oxygen-starved planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Ignoring the warnings of the Prophets, Sisko leads an invasion into Dominion territory.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: With the wormhole closed, Sisko struggles to find a way to re-establish contact with the Bajoran Prophets.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko's quest to find a mythical Bajoran orb leads him to unlock the truth about his own existence.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Determined to prove the superiority of his race, a Vulcan Starfleet officer challenges Sisko and his crew to a baseball game.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir becomes romantically involved with a genetically engineered patient.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo is thrust into a violent showdown when a Dominion war leader defects.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Worf's decision to send a legendary Klingon warrior back into battle could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko and the crew fight for their lives during a violent standoff at a key communications outpost.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picard’s only hope for a future rests within the Nexus...and a legendary captain from the past.

programme.title: Star Trek VIII: First Contact

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: When the crew of the Enterprise learns of the federation plot against the inhabitants of a unique planet, Capt. Picard begins an open rebellion.

programme.desc: Picard’s only hope for a future rests within the Nexus...and a legendary captain from the past.

programme.desc: When the crew of the Enterprise learns of the federation plot against the inhabitants of a unique planet, Capt. Picard begins an open rebellion.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After diverting to a secret meeting with an old friend and some of Starfleet's finest commanders, Picard finds the Horatio blown to bits just hours after the meeting and he returns the Enterprise to Earth looking for answers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While assigned to investigate missing outposts in the Neutral Zone, the Enterprise revives three cryogenically frozen people found aboard a wayward derelict Earth vessel.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Deanna is impregnated by an unknown alien life-form, and Dr. Katherine Pulaski joins the Enterprise as the ship's new Chief Medical Officer.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a mysterious void in space and when they move in closer to investigate further, it envelops them and they can't get out.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Enterprise arrives a few days early at its rendezvous point to meet the USS Victory, the crew have a bit of leisure time on their hands.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise rescues the captain of a broken-down freighter, only to become involved in a dispute between feuding worlds--each demanding custody of their guest.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew ferries a deaf mediator to Solais V to negotiate an end to a civil war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise responds to a request for medical assistance from Dr. Ira Graves, considered by many to be the greatest living mind in the universe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is en route to Star Station India when received a distress signal from the USS Lantree, a Federation supply ship. When they arrive, they find everyone aboard the Lantree of what seems to be old age.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Federation promotes an officer exchange program, Commander Riker decides to accept an assignment aboard a Klingon war ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Data resigns his commission rather than be dismantled for examination by an inadequately skilled scientist, a formal hearing is convened to determine whether Data is considered property without rights or is a sentient being.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ens. Wesley Crusher suffers from the pangs of first love when the Enterprise is tasked to transport a young woman, Salia, back to her home where she is to become the leader of her people.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and the Enterprise respond to a distress call from its sister ship the USS Yamato. It has been facing a number of serious technical glitches and they lost 18 crew members when the containment field on a shuttle failed.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Enterprise is advised by a passing Klingon vessel that there is strange debris in orbit around a nearby planet, they investigate only to find a piece of a NASA spacecraft emblazoned with the US flag.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven's attempt to explore her human side distracts her from her duties and puts Voyager at risk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Q's unruly and omnipotent son wreaks interstellar havoc when he is left in Janeway's care.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor publishes a holo-novel based on his Voyager experiences which scandalizes the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager recovers a long-lost space probe which has caused terrible radiation damage on a distant planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven and Chakotay stumble upon a race of primitive humanoids isolated from technological progress by an energy barrier.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix is faced with the decision of a lifetime when Voyager locates a tribe of exiled Talaxians on a distant asteroid.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is held hostage by aliens who force the Doctor to help them steal Voyager's warp core.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's quest to return home is aided by a visitor from the future – Admiral Kathryn Janeway.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway risks Voyager's shortcut home in order to destroy the Borg and save millions of lives.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While searching for a missing officer, Captain Kathryn Janeway and the crew of the Starship Voyager are swept 70,000 light years from home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew launches a daring rescue mission to save two officers trapped in a subterranean city facing disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tensions rise between the merged Starfleet and Maquis crews when the ship becomes trapped inside a star that's collapsed upon itself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Paris and Janeway are sent back in time, they must decide whether to violate the Prime Directive by warning residents of a planet facing annihilation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix faces certain death when an alien race stricken by a devastating plague "harvests" his lungs.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Suspecting an alien tracking device may be hidden somewhere aboard the Destiny, Col. Young and Lt. Scott search the ship’s hull. While distracted by the search, a group aboard the Destiny puts in action a coup that has life-threatening consequences.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Dwindling supplies, tedious routines, and low morale continue to plague the crew of the Destiny when the ship suddenly drops out of FTL and enters the orbit of an uncharted star. But, for the first time, the countdown clock doesn’t activate!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Disregarding orders, Dr. Rush links himself to the Destiny’s computer via the neural interface chair, hoping it will reveal the code needed to control Destiny’s flight path. Learning of this, Col. Young struggles with letting Rush risk his life.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Colonel Jack O'Neill and the team travel to Chartago, where Teal'c is recognized as once having been head Jaffa to the sinister Goa'uld Apothis. He's arrested for murder and put on trial for his life. Can his comrades save him?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team rescues a group of highly developed survivors from the cataclysmic planet of Tollan. To stop the legendary knowledge of the Tollan people from falling into the wrong hands, O'Neill and his team stake all on the cross-universal rescue.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Following a Stargate technical defect, O'Neill and Carter find themselves stranded on an icy wasteland. O'Neill is severely wounded, both are freezing to death, and nobody can find the section of the universe in which they are stranded!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Upon landing on Planet PX3 989, the mysterious alien Harlan renders the SG-1 team unconscious. After waking and returning to Earth, they find that their spirits and minds have been transferred to androids. Can the team regain their bodies and souls?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A mysterious mirror transports Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) to another dimension. Suddenly he finds himself on an alternate Earth that is under attack from the Goa'uld. Can he return to his dimension and save the world?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Only Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) knows of the Goa'uld plans to invade Earth. But no one takes his warnings seriously - in fact, this time the authorities have chosen to terminate the costly Stargate program and close the gate forever.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: To stop the Goa'uld invasion, the SG-1 team disobeys orders and transports itself to the Goa'uld attack headquarters. Landing amidst preparations for an all-out strike on Earth, the way home is blocked. Can the team avert disaster and save humanity?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a fleet of Goa'uld warships launches a surprise attack, the SG-1 team uses the Stargate to board an enemy ship with enough explosives to destroy the alien force. But the team's capture suddenly turns their objective into a suicide mission!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a daring mission to rescue victims of an interplanetary attack, Carter's body is inhabited by a Goa'uld. And now that Carter has brought the demon back to Earth inside her, the SG-1 team must find a way to destroy it....without destroying Carter!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the SG-1 team inadvertently helps a desperate criminal, they are charged as accessories to murder and banished to a penal colony. Only one woman there has the power to help them escape....but freedom might not be worth the price she is asking!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exploring a strange and beautiful garden in a distant world, the team members are trapped, knocked unconscious, and forced to relive their most haunting memories. Now, before they can find their way back home, they must find the way back to reality.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.desc: The buyers hit Dan's hometown; the Vegas Ladies' locker really takes off; Kenny's purchase sets his wallet alight; Brandi and Jarrod put their vacation funds on the line.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tiptoes down memory lane in Orange, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker; Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone gets a taste of the underworld in Brooklyn with Johnny Torrio. Reuniting in Chicago, they start bootlegging and anger local Irish gangsters.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A new mayor forces Torrio and Capone outside Chicago to nearby Cicero. There, Capone's brother Frank fixes an election, placing himself in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A betrayal destroys peace in Chicago, and Torrio and Capone seek revenge against the Irish gangs. The "Beer Wars" make Capone Chicago's top gangster.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Al Capone outwits Eliot Ness, but Capone's criminal empire remains in jeopardy when the IRS plants an undercover agent in his gang.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Visit the creative team behind Breaking Bad. Join Emmy-winner Bryan Cranston, Vince Gilligan and the entire writing team as they divulge how they created the stories for a show that was recently named one of the best written TV series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Pay a visit to the team behind Parks & Recreation, the show that skewers small-town politics and features one of America's most energetic, comic talents. Amy Poehler and the writers delve into what it's like to be funny for a living.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Dexter, the show about a serial killer with a strict moral code. Now in its 8th and final season, get rare insights from actor Michael C. Hall and show runner, Scott Buck, and the team who brought Dexter Morgan to life.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside New Girl, the cult comedy about an adorkable girl and her three male roommates trying to make their way in the big city. Creator Liz Meriwether, actor Jake Johnson and the writing team share juicy details of their off-beat writer's room.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Join the co-creators of Game of Thrones, the hit HBO series, as they open up in a rare and candid behind-the-scenes look. In a revealing conversation, find out how Game of Thrones became the most epic television series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind the curtain of one of the scariest and most unique TV series, American Horror Story, with creators Ryan Murphy & Brad Falchuck. See these creative minds spill the secrets of their success behind "one of the greatest TV dramas ever created."

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash takes viewers behind the scandals of Scandal with creator and showrunner Shonda Rhimes, star Kerry Washington and writers Mark Wilding, Matt Byrne, Jenna Bans and Heather Mitchell as they dish about one of tv's most provocative shows.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash explores the world of comic book adaptations for TV with "The Walking Dead" Creator Robert Kirkman and "Smallville" Creators Al Gough and Miles Millar. Pop culture expert Blair Butler and TV Guide's Michael Schneider join the chat.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside the show that exposes our nation's (fictitious) dirty underbelly. "House of Cards" Showrunner Beau Willimon, star Molly Parker, writer Laura Eason and Co-Executive Producer John Mankiewicz reveal the creative process behind the hit series.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash gets a behind-the-scenes look at the groundbreaking television series "Sons of Anarchy". Creator Kurt Sutter, star Katey Sagal and Executive Producers Charles Murray and Mike Daniels reveal the inner workings behind FX's biggest hit.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Jim Rash joins Creators Robert and Michelle King, star Julianna Margulies and Executive Producer Ted Humphrey to discuss "The Good Wife." From the hottest sex scenes to celebrity guests, get an exclusive glimpse into the creative process.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda has a hard time talking to the newest ghost in her life, she soon learns that the reason why he visited her is because he is in a coma.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A ghost who can recall his previous lives appears to be destined for another reincarnation as the child of Melinda's pregnant friend---but the spirit doesn't want to return and actively seeks to harm the unborn baby.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When her Jeep breaks down on a deserted road, Melinda gets involved with a mystery when a spirit who looks like a skeleton gives her a warning to stay away.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Following a career-week presentation at Grandview High, Melinda sees the spirit of a cheerleader attack her former squad-mates.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda's life is put on the line when a desperate spirit leads her to a criminal.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda is bewildered when she deals with the ghost of Jason Bennett, a man who died 10 years prior before his high school graduation.

programme.desc: After seeing Delia's husband's spirit sabotaging Delia's date, Melinda must reveal her identity to Delia in order to help.
